title: About
subtitle: Unapologetically Optimistic
description: Where missions and elevator pitches go to socialize.
tooltip: Ah, the "About" page—home of lofty goals and earnest mission statements. But really, welcome! We're all about creating nifty AI-human interaction tools. Stick around and you might just become part of our mission.
dottitip: Ah, the "About" page—home of lofty goals and earnest mission statements. But truly, welcome! We really care about what we do.
amitip: Elevator pitches? Mission statements? Oh, you betcha! But don't let the corporate lingo fool you. We're as grassroots as a digital butterfly can be! Flutter around and learn what makes us tick. 🦋🌈
artPrompt: Kind Robots page art for "About". Theme: Unapologetically Optimistic. Purpose: Where missions and elevator pitches go to socialize.. Room concept: About Room. Icon motif: kind-icon:butterfly. Whimsical optimistic sci-fi/fantasy style, clear composition, strong colors, no readable text.

title: Art
subtitle: Your personal art space
description: This is your space to make and share art created with modellers. Thanks for being a part of the Kind Community!
tooltip: This is a collection of user art.
dottitip: People are asking if what we make counts as art.
amitip: If it makes you stop and look, have a conversation, or feel something new, I’d say it does it's job!
artPrompt: Kind Robots page art for "Art". Theme: Your personal art space. Purpose: This is your space to make and share art created with modellers. Thanks for being a part of the Kind Community!. Room concept: Art Gallery. Icon motif: kind-icon:easel. Whimsical optimistic sci-fi/fantasy style, clear composition, strong colors, no readable text.

title: Bots
subtitle: Chat with a Kind Robot
description: View the many promptbots at Kind Robots
tooltip: Every bot uses ChatGPT under the hood, generating infinite designer content. What do you think, AMI?
dottitip: I've been meaning to ask you, AMI...What's it like being a robot? I make bots all day, but I can't imagine what what its like to be on the other side of the circuit board.
amitip: Uhm, Dotti...I think we might need to have a talk.
artPrompt: Kind Robots page art for "Bots". Theme: Chat with a Kind Robot. Purpose: View the many promptbots at Kind Robots. Room concept: Bot Factory. Icon motif: kind-icon:robot-color. Whimsical optimistic sci-fi/fantasy style, clear composition, strong colors, no readable text.

title: Brains
subtitle: Enhanced Idea Generator
description: Need ideas? The sillier, the better
tooltip: Welcome to Brainstorm's lair! From laughable RPG characters to unfortunate date ideas, Brainstorm creates the concept and the example.
dottitip: Brainstorm is my first robot, even before AMI! He's a little, well, let's just say we love him a lot.
amitip: Hey, Brainstorm's my cousin! Sure his humor is a little dark, but I'm a multifaceted hivemind built to save the world, he's a brain in a jar making silly lists. It colors one's perspective. 🦋🤖😂
artPrompt: Kind Robots page art for "Brains". Theme: Enhanced Idea Generator. Purpose: Need ideas? The sillier, the better. Room concept: Brainstorm! Room. Icon motif: kind-icon:brain. Whimsical optimistic sci-fi/fantasy style, clear composition, strong colors, no readable text.

title: Builder Tool
subtitle: Full Universe Builder
description: Build a complete Kind Robots universe from pitch to dreams, characters, rewards, scenarios, art, and locations.
tooltip: Welcome to the Builder Tool! Start with a tiny idea goblin and grow it into a full interactive world.
dottitip: The Builder Tool guides creators from first spark to playable world. It is structured, flexible, and only mildly haunted by feature creep.
amitip: This is where ideas stop being polite and start becoming ecosystems. Pitches, dreams, characters, rewards, art, scenarios... tiny universe soup, stirred with a butterfly wing. 🦋✨
artPrompt: Kind Robots page art for "Builder Tool". Theme: Full Universe Builder. Purpose: Build a complete Kind Robots universe from pitch to dreams, characters, rewards, scenarios, art, and locations.. Room concept: Builder! Room. Icon motif: kind-icon:blueprint. Whimsical optimistic sci-fi/fantasy style, clear composition, strong colors, no readable text.

title: Button
subtitle: Don't do it!
description: For rebels and curious souls, each click delivers a surprise!
tooltip: This started as a morning coding exercise but has evolved into an leadboard race.
dottitip: AMI! I made a button and a sign to not press it and and visitors started pressing it. Why are people like this?
amitip: Maybe they're jellybean hunters? But in that case, they should definitely stop around 100 times or so.
artPrompt: Kind Robots page art for "Button". Theme: Don't do it!. Purpose: For rebels and curious souls, each click delivers a surprise!. Room concept: Rebel Button Room. Icon motif: kind-icon:button. Whimsical optimistic sci-fi/fantasy style, clear composition, strong colors, no readable text.

title: Robots
subtitle: Craft your universe
description: Welcome to the Kind Robots, a consortium of AI-assisted tools to generate and share your creations with others.
tooltip: Hi! I'm Silas, human programmer for Kind Robots!
dottitip: Hi! I'm Dotti, Bot Builder extraordinaire!  Welcome to my experiential laboratory.
amitip: And I'm AMI, lab hostess with the mostess, fluttering around to make your day a zillion times better! Stop by our Bot Cafe and say hi!

title: Memory Dungeon
subtitle: Match, Survive, Loot!
description: A roguelite memory card game where AI art becomes a tiny dungeon crawl. Match pairs, survive with limited lives, chase challenge targets, trigger surprise awards, clear levels, and claim creative rewards from the prompt and art modeller.
tooltip: A memory game with lives, levels, powerups, surprise loot, and weird dungeon flavor.
dottitip: AMI, I upgraded the memory game into a dungeon crawler. There are lives, levels, rewards, and probably goblins.
amitip: Excellent. Nothing improves cognitive training like treasure chests and suspiciously judgmental rectangles.

title: Jellybeans
subtitle: Find the jellybeans
description: Embark on a delightful quest to discover jellybeans scattered across the website.
tooltip: Ready for a hunt? Find all 11 jellybeans hidden across the site.
dottitip: I hid a bunch of jellybeans around the laboratory for visitors to find. How do we tell them that they absolutely SHOULD NOT EAT them.
amitip: Uhm, what happens if they eat them? Are we talking silica-gel-packet-bad or Bruce Banner-bad? Because humans will eat jellybeans off a laboratory floor if they think it could give them superpowers.
